user_system_path: Seam #414 — owner-reported continuity defects, batched: (1) the Foldera brand wordmark linked to /dashboard in all three app shells (ProductShell, layout/dashboard-shell, layout/sidebar) instead of the homepage; now -> /. (2) The homepage had two stacked CTA blocks at the bottom (landing-pilot 'Stop checking nine apps' + a redundant landing-final-cta 'Restore your continuity'); removed the final-cta, kept the nine-apps one. Sign-in survives in header, mobile menu, footer. Updated the three e2e specs that asserted the removed final-cta testIds. Frontend-only, deterministic, no schema/deps. Constraint: NO paid API calls to test — prove in the harness.
allowed_files_raw: Seam #414: homepage final-CTA removal + brand wordmark -> / across three shells + the three coupled e2e specs + control-plane.
forbidden_files_raw: No schema (supabase/**), no dependency changes (package.json / lock), no runtime/API logic.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run build && npm run lint
required_browser_proof: Build + lint + tsc green; e2e specs updated to match the new single-CTA homepage and removed final-cta testIds (headless browser not runnable in this harness). Live owner validation: (a) the homepage bottom shows ONE CTA block ('Stop checking nine apps'); (b) clicking the Foldera brand in the app returns to the homepage.
acceptance_condition: Homepage bottom renders a single CTA section (the nine-apps pilot), the redundant final-CTA is gone with no dangling testId references, the Foldera brand links to / in all three shells, and gate:continuity + build + lint are green.
anti_regression_checks: no dangling references to landing-final-cta / landing-final-access-cta / landing-final-login-cta
stop_condition: Stop when the draft PR for #414 is open with CI green, or BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT on owner-side visual validation.
next_command: Owner: confirm the homepage bottom shows one CTA and the brand returns home. Then the standing continuity audit (unify the three brand marks; sweep nav/dead-links) and the live send validation continue.
